_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative genomic analyses of neurofibromatosis tumours identify SOX9 as a biomarker and survival gene.
_publications._context: We maintained MPNST cell lines ST88-14, STS26T, S520, S462, 88-3, 90-8 and YST1 as described previously | Establishment of the YST-1 (Nagashima et al., 1990), STS-26T (Dahlberg et al., 1993) and ST88-14 (Ryan et al., 1994) human MPNST cell lines | ...NF1 + / human sporadic MPNST STS-26T cell line have been previously described... | Human MPNST cell lines S462, STS-26T, ST88-14, and 90-8 and an immortalized normal human Schwann cell line (iHSCλ2) were obtained from Nancy Ratner | MPNST cell lines STS26T, ST8814, ST88-3 S462, T265p21, S520, 90–8, and YST1 and normal human Schwann cells were obtained and maintained | sporadic MPNST cells (STS26T, D. Scoles) were seeded on poly-l-lysine–coated 12-mm circle glass coverslips | Authenticated human MPNST cell lines (sporadic STS26T, called 26T, Cellosaurus RRID: CVCL_8917; NF1-associated S462, Cellosaurus RRID: CVCL_1Y70) | STS26T and T265 cells were routinely maintained in DMEM high-glucose medium...NF1(+/+) and NF1(-/-) MPNST cell lines | MPNST cell lines (STS-26T, S462, S462TY, T265) were obtained from Dr. David Largaespada's laboratory | STS-26T (a generous gift from D. Scoles, Cedars-Sinai Medical Center, Los Angeles, CA, U.S.A.) | human MPNST cell lines (ST88-14, STS26T, S462, S462-TY, and T265) were cultured in complete media | The MPNST cell lines STS26T, T265, and ST8814 have been reported before and were gifted by Dr. Nancy Ratner
